description: Analyzes current issues in real estate law with a focus on the acquisition, leasing, financing, and development of real estate projects.  Includes a big picture view of these topics as well as analyzing them in the specific context of various development deals underway across the United States.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (REAL EST 410) and (URB R PL/​ECON/​REAL EST  420or concurrent enrollment), or graduate/professional standing
